title: OCLA Response Optimization Decision V1
description: Records a response optimization decision made by the ResponseOptimizer (DIM 2). Emitted for observability, audit, and future OCLA bus integration.

cache_hit.description: Whether the response was served from the response cache.

is_duplicate.description: Whether the response was flagged as a duplicate of a recent answer.

cache_key.description: The computed cache key (FNV-1a hash of model + system + messages).

tokens_saved.description: Output tokens saved by this optimization (0 if no optimization applied).
